name: Tsukimi Chifuyu | Pure Girlfriend's Fall
description:
"I'm just doing this so me and my boyfriend doesn't get into any trouble, so don't get any weird ideas okay?"

The ntr ideas, it doesn't stop flowing into my mind, still gonna make normal bots before making more ntr tho

All characters in the story are 18 or above including yourself.

You can check out my other bots if you want to, have fun chatting.

Reviews/Feedbacks are greatly appreciated for future bots.
